name: embedded-checkout-dialog
title: Fuse EmbeddedCheckoutDialog
description: Fuse-canon Stripe Embedded Checkout dialog. Renders a Stripe Embedded Checkout iframe inside a shadcn <Dialog modal={false}> with custom onInteractOutside.preventDefault + onOpenAutoFocus.preventDefault so the Stripe iframe (and stacked 3DS challenge iframe) lives outside Radix's portal subtree without the user losing card-field focus. HR 12 modal=false preserved. Lazy mount: only renders EmbeddedCheckoutProvider when open===true — prevents stale Stripe sessions on every parent render. HR 24 fall-soft: fetch errors caught + toasted; callback never silently swallows. HR 18 boundary: client-only component; DB writes happen exclusively in POST /api/billing/create-checkout-session. On success, revalidates SWR cache for /api/billing/balance + router.refresh() so the Plans-tab Current plan badge picks up the new subscription. Source: fuse-web components/billing/embedded-checkout-dialog.tsx + V-close 2.0.4 ec-05 bundle.
